agents_intake.note: Repo-local AGENTS workflow, issue-first rule, blueprint-first rule, and validation ladder were incorporated before non-trivial writes.

issue_branch_linkage.note: Issue #57 is active on branch `fix/57-reduce-frontend-entry-chunk-size-with-route-level-code-splitting` for the bounded frontend code-splitting follow-up over clean `main`.

harness_setup.note: docs/architecture and .rah remain initialized and reusable.

preserved_issue18_baseline.note: The landed knowledge/RAG/workbook/advisor seams from issue #18 are preserved as the compatibility baseline instead of the active architecture target.

model_first_prompt_intake.note: The April 7, 2026 model-first SmartGrow directive is now reflected in the blueprint, system brief, gap register, ADR, and module spec.

model_first_blueprint_alignment.note: Root and architecture blueprints now redirect the mainline toward crop models, gas exchange, scenarios, sensitivities, constraints, and model-aware advisor surfaces.

model_first_adr.note: ADR-001 records the model-first, RAG-explained architecture decision.

phase1_module_spec.note: Module-001 defines the bounded phase-1 state/event/runtime foundation for issue #19.

implementation_gate.note: The phase-1 persistence adapter is frozen as a separate SQLite sidecar at `artifacts/models/model_runtime.sqlite3`, and the migration seam is landed through `crop_models/`, `model_runtime/`, and `POST /api/models/snapshot|replay`.

legacy_model_inventory.note: Legacy tomato and cucumber model files remain available as donor logic for the new crop-model service layer.

crop_model_service_layer.note: Dedicated `crop_models/` wrappers now expose normalized cucumber and tomato state snapshots plus `leaf_removal` / `fruit_thinning` event application over the existing adapter seam.

work_event_state_store.note: A canonical `ModelStateStore` now persists `crop_model_states`, `crop_model_snapshots`, and `crop_work_events` in a dedicated SQLite sidecar, with replay-tested before/after snapshot linkage.

gas_exchange_service_layer.note: Reusable `gas_exchange_fvcb.py`, `stomatal_ball_berry.py`, and `canopy_integration.py` are now exposed through `crop_models/`, and the cucumber/tomato snapshot wrappers consume them to publish upper/middle/bottom leaf activity plus limiting-factor summaries.

scenario_sensitivity_runtime.note: The first backend-only `scenario_runner.py`, `sensitivity_engine.py`, and `constraint_engine.py` slice is now landed with additive `POST /api/models/scenario` plus `POST /api/models/sensitivity`, SQLite persistence for `scenario_runs`/`scenario_outputs`/`sensitivity_outputs`, and targeted sign/trust-region/scenario-alignment tests.

advisor_contract_realignment.note: Current `/api/advisor/*`, `/api/environment/recommend`, and `/api/work/recommend` flows now preserve the issue #18 field names while additively attaching a model-first `machine_payload.model_runtime` block built from the landed bounded scenario/sensitivity runtime, plus fallback-safe summary/chat envelopes and contract-locking orchestration tests.

ui_counterfactual_surface.note: The `environment`, `physiology`, and `work` advisor tabs now render additive `machine_payload.model_runtime` through a shared counterfactual/sensitivity panel, while preserving the existing issue #18 analysis and action cards as the compatibility shell.

assistant_harvest_runtime_alignment.note: The `harvest_market` tab now consumes the shared runtime panel, and the Assistant/chat UX now keeps `machine_payload.model_runtime` beside each AI reply through a compact snapshot-aware runtime strip without replacing the legacy text flow.

summary_runtime_surface.note: The dashboard-level `AiAdvisor` summary surface now threads `/api/advisor/summary` `machine_payload.model_runtime` into a compact model-first runtime strip, while `useAiAssistant` clears stale runtime on new requests and ignores late summary responses from older refreshes or crop switches.

weather_panel_resilience.note: Daegu weather fetches now fall back to cached or synthetic payloads when Open-Meteo times out or 502s, and the weather panel exposes cached/fallback provider status instead of presenting degraded data as live.

frontend_uiux_layout_polish.note: Sensor-card / AI-advisor height coupling decoupled via `items-start`, `auto-rows-fr` removal, `max-h` cap on advisor wrapper, and internal scroll boundaries in AiAdvisor. Validated with lint, build, and before/after screenshots at 1920x1080.

issue23_frontend_stabilization.note: Issue #23 local stabilization now adds `AppShell` plus shared loading/drawer fallbacks, Korean-first structured advisory display payloads across summary/chat, availability-aware chart nulling through `fieldAvailability`, per-field telemetry timestamps for KPI age labels, offline-over-missing summary precedence, mobile locale controls, localized cleanup across analytics/advisor surfaces, an additional hardening pass that localizes visible SmartGrow/advisor copy plus stage/medium/common token labels, a farmer-facing terminology cleanup that hides raw evidence/provenance surfaces, a KPI-strip layout fix that prevents warning-state card text from colliding in narrow widths, a SmartGrow surface redesign that turns the old static catalog into actionable quick-entry cards, a contextual knowledge-search upgrade that seeds the drawer from advisor/chat/dashboard intent, shows grower-friendly routed scope summaries, and hides internal API recovery wording, plus a pesticide-advisor grower-detail slice that prefers Hangul product aliases in Korean mode, expands cycle/rotation/backup-option detail, localizes backend limitation text on the frontend, and preserves compatibility when older payloads omit additive rotation fields.

issue23_pr_validation.note: PR #24 merged issue #23 into `main` after the latest local ladder stayed green for the pesticide-advisor limitation localization plus fallback regression harness, and refreshed GitHub Actions Backend/Frontend Validation passed on the final PR head. Screenshots remain under `screenshots/` as local comparison artifacts.

issue25_warning_copy_cleanup.note: The remaining grower-visible English/internal caveats are localized or hidden from the dashboard/advisor/chat surfaces, actionable pesticide label-check guidance stays visible, and non-actionable implementation scope is now tracked only in the gap register and harness notes.

issue25_pr_validation.note: PR #26 merged issue #25 into `main` after the local validation ladder stayed green (`npm --prefix frontend run test`, `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`, `poetry run ruff check .`, `poetry run pytest`) and the refreshed GitHub Actions Backend/Frontend Validation both returned success.

issue27_prompt_intake.note: The internal-model-only RTR overhaul directive is now bound to issue #27 and its issue-based branch before non-trivial writes resumed.

rtr_internal_model_optimizer_backend.note: The backend now lands `services/rtr/` bridge, objective, optimizer, scenario, derivation, and unit-projection layers, extends `/api/rtr/profiles` compatibly, adds `/api/rtr/state|optimize|scenario|sensitivity|area-settings`, and passes the focused RTR backend test ladder locally.

rtr_frontend_optimizer_surface.note: The frontend now renders an optimizer-driven `RTROptimizerPanel` over the new `/api/rtr/*` contracts, demotes the legacy `RTROutlookPanel` to a baseline/fallback comparison card, preserves `/api/rtr/profiles` compatibility, and locks the surface with dedicated component and hook tests.

rtr_area_unit_projection.note: Canonical m² results remain the backend/UI source of truth while a shared `AreaUnitContext`, `AreaUnitPanel`, and deterministic `areaUnits` helpers now replace the hardcoded `AREA_M2` path, persist user area overrides, and render actual-area yield/energy projections in parallel.

rtr_issue27_local_validation.note: The full local ladder is green for issue #27: `npm --prefix frontend run test`, `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`, `poetry run ruff check .`, and full `pytest` now pass after the frontend optimizer + area-projection slice landed.

issue27_pr_validation.note: PR #28 merged issue #27 into `main` after local RTR validation stayed green, GitHub Actions Backend/Frontend validation both passed, and the project item auto-closed to `Done`.

issue3_intake_prep.note: PR #29 merged the issue #3 intake-prep slice into `main`, so the grower-window intake note and restart surfaces now exist in the baseline without claiming that calibration inputs have been supplied.

issue19_pr_validation.note: Issue #19 is closed and PR #20 is merged after the final local validation ladder (`poetry run ruff check .`, `poetry run pytest`, `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`) plus green GitHub Actions push/pull_request runs.

work_event_compare_loop.note: Issue #21 now adds `ModelStateStore.load_current_state()` plus `list_work_events()`, an additive backend `work_event_compare` replay-diff contract over persisted snapshots and bounded `leaf_removal` / `fruit_thinning` candidates, and a dedicated `WorkTab` compare block beside the existing control-scenario runtime panel.

work_event_compare_hardening.note: Greenhouse scoping, malformed payload tolerance, store-unavailable degrade behavior, endpoint forwarding, crop-specific cucumber/tomato candidate agronomy, ranking, additive compare detail fields, backend matrix coverage, and a minimal frontend Vitest/RTL `WorkTab` component harness are now landed and locally validated.

issue21_pr_validation.note: PR #22 merged issue #21 into `main` after the green local ladder (`poetry run ruff check .`, `poetry run pytest`, `npm --prefix frontend run test`, `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`) and successful GitHub Actions backend/frontend validation.

exact_advisor_surface_routes.note: Exact additive `/api/advisor/environment`, `/api/advisor/physiology`, `/api/advisor/work-tradeoff`, and `/api/advisor/harvest` routes now delegate over the landed model-aware tab surfaces, `/api/advisor/work-tradeoff` flattens the persisted compare contract into the directive-aligned summary/current_state/options response shape, and `/api/knowledge/status` advertises the exact routes alongside the preserved legacy seams.

rtr_good_production_windows_followup.note: Issue #3 is still blocked on the operator supplying real grower-approved tomato/cucumber good-production periods, but it is no longer an implementation blocker because issue #37 adds an in-product calibration workspace plus `/api/rtr/calibration-*` routes for capturing and saving those windows.

rtr_grower_window_input_contract.note: The repository now carries an explicit grower-window intake note that defines the required per-window fields, evidence expectations, YAML update path, recalibration command, and validation ladder needed before replacing the current heuristic/demo windows.

rtr_grower_window_machine_contract.note: The good-window loader and calibration CLI now distinguish `heuristic-demo` windows from approved windows, preserve approval metadata fields, reject approved windows that omit required metadata, and expose the current approved/demo counts during calibration runs.

rtr_optimizer_frontend_hardening.note: Issue #32 now prevents optimistic optimizer/profile activation before `/api/rtr/profiles` is ready, waits for hydrated or manually entered node-rate targets instead of auto-running against hardcoded crop fallbacks, suppresses first-mount re-persistence of localStorage-restored local area overrides, preserves raw `/api/rtr/profiles` payload fields in the hook, and locks the surface with dedicated Vitest coverage.

rtr_optimizer_decision_surface.note: Issue #34 keeps stale telemetry in a read-only optimizer mode instead of collapsing the whole surface, labels actual-area provenance in the shared area panel, enriches scenario rows with confidence/risk/yield/actual-area projections, disables unsafe controls while telemetry is blocked, and locks the new warning/scenario detail behavior through targeted backend and frontend regression tests.

rtr_calibration_workspace.note: Issue #37 adds additive `/api/rtr/calibration-state|preview|save`, house-scoped grower-window normalization/persistence helpers, and a new `RTRCalibrationWorkspace` UI that lets operators preview/save calibration windows and immediately refresh the live optimizer/profile surfaces without relying on external RAG or manual YAML editing.

issue37_local_validation.note: Issue #37 stayed green locally with `npm --prefix frontend run test`, `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`, `poetry run ruff check .`, and full `poetry run pytest` after the calibration workspace and backend routes landed.

issue37_pr_validation.note: PR #38 merged issue #37 into `main` after the local validation ladder stayed green and GitHub Actions Backend/Frontend validation both completed successfully.

issue39_rtr_control_surface_followup.note: Issue #39 now adds fixed baseline offset compare rows (`-0.3C`, `+0.3C`, `+0.6C`) plus screen-bias finite-difference sensitivity rows for humidity/disease risk, extends the frontend RTR label/type contract accordingly, and locks the new surfaces in backend/frontend regression tests.

issue39_local_validation.note: Issue #39 is locally green with `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run test`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`, `poetry run ruff check .`, `poetry run pytest`, and `git diff --check` after the control-surface follow-up landed.

issue39_pr_validation.note: PR #40 merged issue #39 into `main` after the local validation ladder stayed green and GitHub Actions Backend/Frontend validation both completed successfully on head `312724d`.

issue32_pr_validation.note: PR #33 merged issue #32 into `main` after the green local ladder (`npm --prefix frontend run test`, `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`, `poetry run ruff check .`, `poetry run pytest tests/test_rtr_optimizer.py`, `poetry run pytest tests/test_smoke.py -k rtr`, `poetry run pytest`) and successful GitHub Actions Backend/Frontend validation.

issue34_pr_validation.note: PR #35 merged issue #34 into `main` after the green local ladder (`npm --prefix frontend run test`, `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`, `poetry run ruff check .`, `poetry run pytest tests/test_rtr_optimizer.py`, `poetry run pytest tests/test_smoke.py -k rtr`, `poetry run pytest`) and successful GitHub Actions Backend/Frontend validation.

issue41_actuator_first_hvac_optimizer.note: Issue #41 promotes RTR from temperature-first plus auxiliary heuristics to an actuator-first control seam: heating, cooling, ventilation, thermal screen, circulation fan, and CO2 now flow through `actuator_bridge -> post_control_state -> crop_bridge -> objective_terms`, scenario/sensitivity surfaces reflect those first-class controls, and the dashboard keeps m²-canonical plus actual-area projection outputs.

issue41_blocker_fixup.note: The post-review fix-up removes ventilation-energy double counting, aligns optimize/scenario baseline semantics through a shared baseline control candidate, makes sensitivity objective weights honor `include_energy_cost`/`include_labor_cost` even in `custom_weights` mode, and preserves explicit zero-valued circulation-fan overrides in custom scenarios.

issue41_local_validation.note: Issue #41 is locally green after the blocker fix-up: `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run test`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`, `poetry run ruff check .`, `poetry run pytest`, and `git diff --check` all pass, with pytest now at `144 passed, 31 warnings`.

issue41_pr_validation.note: PR #42 merged issue #41 into `main` after the actuator-first RTR seam and blocker-fix follow-up stayed green locally and GitHub Actions Backend/Frontend validation both passed on the final head.

issue47_prompt_gap_closure.note: Issue #47 closes the remaining `codex_phytosync_shadcn_redesign_prompt.md` gaps over the merged issue #45 UI baseline by landing route-driven `PhytoSync` workspace modules, shared design-token/style layers, a dedicated ask/search workspace, Korean visible-copy cleanup, and accessibility/test hardening without breaking existing dashboard/runtime surfaces.

issue47_local_validation.note: Issue #47 is locally green with `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run test -- --pool=threads`, and `npm --prefix frontend run build` after the ask/search route shell, Korean copy cleanup, and tab/accessibility regressions were fixed.

issue47_pr_validation.note: PR #48 merged issue #47 into `main` at `4515742b0c63b73856564d65ce5353a9dfdd027d` after the route-shell gap-closure branch stayed green locally and GitHub Actions Backend/Frontend validation both passed.

issue49_warm_editorial_followup.note: Issue #49 adds the warmer `DESIGN.md` translation over the merged issue #47 route shell: warm paper surfaces, red-led editorial accents, wider layout treatment, real ask-tab switching, and route-level resources/alerts/ask command-center surfaces without regressing the landed advisor/RTR/runtime contracts.

issue49_local_validation.note: Issue #49 stayed locally green with `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run test -- --pool=threads`, `npm --prefix frontend run build`, and `git diff --check` before the branch was pushed.

root_postmerge_cleanup.note: After issue #49 merged, the root repository was normalized back to clean `main`, local-only artifacts were hidden with `.git/info/exclude`, and obsolete issue43/45/47/49 worktree folders were removed once lingering `vite`/`esbuild`/`uvicorn` processes were stopped.

issue57_frontend_chunk_split.note: The frontend build now splits React, router, and lucide vendor groups in `frontend/vite.config.ts`, reducing the production `index` chunk from `513.46 kB` to `284.08 kB` and removing the Vite >500 kB warning without changing runtime surfaces.

issue57_local_validation.note: Issue #57 is locally green with `npm --prefix frontend run lint`, `npm --prefix frontend run test -- --pool=threads`, and `npm --prefix frontend run build` after the vendor chunk split landed.
